description_long: This is a three-story apartment building with a steeply pitched dark gray shingle roof and a single red brick chimney. The front facade features six symmetrically arranged windows with black wrought-iron railings and a single dormer window projecting from the roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige stucco, giving the building a classic, slightly weathered appearance. The main entrance is a single door located at the bottom right of the front facade, framed by simple architectural detailing. The rear of the building has a similar window arrangement but lacks the decorative railings and dormer. The side walls are plain, with no windows or ornamentation, emphasizing the building's narrow, urban footprint.
description: A three-story beige stucco apartment building with a steep dark roof, symmetrical windows, and a single front door. Features include a dormer, chimney, and decorative window railings on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, six windows with black railings, a dormer window, and the chimney.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, windowless stucco wall and the sloped roof with the chimney visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar window arrangement as the front but without railings or a dormer; the door is also present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a plain, windowless wall and the chimney at the roof's edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on both the front and rear facades, with even spacing between each window and alignment across floors.
